name: GOLFTEC Willow Grove
address: 3638 Welsh Rd Unit B, Willow Grove, PA 19090
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and fitting center focused on data improvement. Utilizing advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, the facility provides a scientific approach to golf coaching. Lessons are built around personalized data feedback, aiming to correct technical flaws and create lasting improvement plans. The studio environment is designed for structured practice and coaching sessions with a curriculum targeting both beginners and seasoned players.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using high-speed cameras and launch monitors
Personalized improvement strategies with certified PGA coaches
Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION for detailed motion capture

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product for sale and used in their systems

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs. GOLFTEC also offers club fitting services and can provide clubs for fitting sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not mentioned as being permitted. The venue does not have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: An 18-hole simulator session is not explicitly timed. Lessons are structured by the coach and typically last for the duration of your booked session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue is not specifically described as kid-friendly. However, it does offer instruction and services that may be suitable for juniors and youth golfers.
